body:
I am a results-driven Full-Stack Developer and technical leader with a passion for solving complex problems and delivering high-quality software at scale. With a proven track record across both public and private sectors, I thrive in fast-paced environments where innovation, collaboration, and engineering excellence are paramount.

I bring deep expertise across a broad technology stack — including TypeScript, JavaScript, C# .NET, Python, PHP, Ruby, and VB .NET — and am highly proficient in modern frameworks such as React, Next.js, AngularJS, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Ruby on Rails, and Laravel. I actively integrate AI-assisted development tooling into my workflow, leveraging tools such as GitHub Copilot and large language model APIs to accelerate delivery, improve code quality, and explore intelligent solutions to engineering challenges.

My engineering philosophy is grounded in SOLID principles, DRY code, and XP values, ensuring that everything I build is maintainable, scalable, and thoroughly tested. I have extensive experience with TDD frameworks including Jest, Cypress, Mocha, Capybara, Jasmine, RSpec, NUnit, and XUnit — and have even engineered a custom test framework from scratch in JavaScript.

Throughout my career I have grown into a confident technical leader, having served as Squad Lead and Scrum Master across multiple high-performing teams. I have mentored and upskilled junior and mid-level developers, facilitated agile ceremonies including sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives, and code reviews, and taken a hands-on role in shaping system architecture and engineering direction. I am passionate about creating environments where teams can do their best work.

I bring over 15 years of commercial experience in system architecture and administration, spanning Azure DevOps, AWS, GCP, MS SQL Server, Oracle databases, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines using tools such as TeamCity, Octopus Deploy, CircleCI, and Buddy Works. I have contributed to the full software development lifecycle — from architectural decisions and infrastructure design through to delivery, deployment, and post-release support.

I am a collaborative, forward-thinking engineer who brings both strategic vision and hands-on capability to every team I join.
